statement: In every magma, Equation 116 (`x = y * ((x * x) * z)`) implies Equation 4576 (`x * (y * z) = (w * w) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0138
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op x x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op w w) u)
